hero.title: Professional ESG reports. Fully automated.
hero.subtitle: The first platform that takes your data from zero to finished report. No consulting, no spreadsheets, no months of waiting.

home.howItWorksTitle: From raw data to finished reports
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to transform your ESG data into actionable insights.
home.step1Desc: Upload PDFs, spreadsheets, or enter data manually. We accept all common ESG formats.
home.step2Desc: Automatic extraction, classification, and mapping to GRI, SASB, TCFD, and other frameworks.
home.step3Desc: Audit-ready reports, score monitoring, and improvement identification.
home.whyTitle: Built for ESG teams that take compliance seriously
home.multiFrameworkDesc: GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, ISSB — all automatically mapped from a single dataset.
home.securityDesc: Protect sensitive corporate data with end-to-end encryption, granular access controls, and enterprise-grade security.
home.teamDesc: Roles and permissions per company, complete audit trails, approval workflows.
home.multiCompanyDesc: Manage ESG for your entire corporate group from a single centralized platform.
home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about the ESG360 platform.
home.faq1q: What types of documents can I upload?
home.faq1a: ESG360 accepts PDFs, Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx, .csv), Word documents, and sustainability reports in any standard format. Our AI engine automatically extracts and classifies ESG data points from unstructured content.
home.faq2a: We support GRI Standards, SASB, TCFD, CDP, ISSB, CSRD, and UN SDGs. Data is automatically mapped across all frameworks simultaneously, so you report once and comply everywhere.
home.faq3q: How does the AI-powered analysis work?
home.faq3a: Our engine uses advanced natural language processing to read your documents, extract relevant data points, classify them by ESG pillar (Environmental, Social, Governance), and map them to the appropriate framework indicators — all in seconds.
home.faq4q: Can I manage multiple companies on one account?
home.faq4a: Yes. ESG360 supports multi-company management with separate dashboards, independent ESG scores, and consolidated group-level reporting from a single account.
home.faq5a: Absolutely. Reports are generated following official framework guidelines and include all required disclosures, data sources, and methodology references. They are ready for external auditors and regulatory submissions.
home.faq6a: Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit using enterprise-grade security standards. We implement role-based access controls and maintain complete audit trails for every action on the platform.
home.trustedBySub: From mid-market scale-ups to listed corporations preparing for CSRD, ISSB and SEC climate disclosures.
home.valuePropsTitle: Replace spreadsheets, consultants and chaos with one auditable platform
home.valueProp1Desc: AI extracts, classifies and maps your ESG data points automatically — what used to take weeks now takes hours.
home.valueProp2Desc: Every disclosure is mapped to GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, ISSB and CSRD with a full audit trail and methodology references.
home.valueProp3Desc: Real-time ESG score translated into credit spread, WACC delta and enterprise value impact — using real sector beta, Damodaran data and a live FRED rate.
home.showcaseTitle: From scattered evidence to a finished ESG report
home.showcaseSub: See how ESG360 turns your raw documents into audit-ready disclosures in four steps.
home.showcase1Desc: PDFs, spreadsheets, sustainability reports, invoices, utility bills — drop them in or connect a data source. We handle the rest.
home.showcase2Desc: Our engine reads, classifies and maps each metric to the right framework indicator with traceable evidence per number.
home.showcase3Desc: E, S, G breakdown with transparent methodology, credit spread in bps, sector WACC delta and enterprise value percentage change — ready to present to investors.
home.showcase4Desc: Generate an Executive Summary and a Full Compliance Report — both ready for auditors, regulators and investors.
home.compareSub: The honest comparison most ESG vendors won't show you.
home.compareRow4c: GRI · SASB · TCFD · CDP · ISSB · CSRD
home.testimonialsTitle: Built for the people who actually publish ESG reports
home.testimonial1Quote: We went from a 3-month reporting cycle to publishing GRI and SASB disclosures in under a week. The AI extraction is genuinely accurate.
home.testimonial2Quote: Our auditors signed off without a single follow-up. The methodology trail and source links per data point made their job trivial.
home.testimonial3Quote: The price of a single ESG360 report is what we used to pay one consultant for half a day of work. The ROI was immediate.
home.bannerText: ESG Financial Intelligence — your sustainability data, priced in basis points.
home.fiSub: ESG translated into spreads, WACC, PD/LGD and enterprise value — for both companies and investors.
home.fiScoreDesc: Composite 0-100 score with bps spread, rating band, peer percentile and explainable drivers.
home.fiClimateDesc: NGFS & IEA scenarios — physical and transition VaR with full methodology disclosure.
home.fiFundingDesc: Per-instrument self-assessment (SLL, green bond, IPO, M&A, PE) with remediation plan.
home.fiPortfolioDesc: Buy-side aggregates: weighted score, climate VaR, top & bottom contributors per holding.
home.partnersTitle: Earn on every ESG client you refer
home.partnersSub: Flat 50% commission on every sale. No client limit. No entry fee. Paid instantly via PIX.
home.partnersStep1Desc: Sign up for free, get your exclusive referral link and access your partner dashboard.
home.partnersStep2Desc: Share your link or register clients directly. Track the pipeline in real-time from your built-in CRM.
home.partnersStep3Desc: Every time a report or plan is sold, you receive exactly half — approved and paid via PIX.
home.partnersBenefit3: Free ESG report to present to prospects
home.partnersDisclaimer: Approval subject to review. Commission paid on confirmed sales.

features.title: ESG intelligence that speaks the language of capital
features.subtitle: From data extraction to enterprise value impact — one platform that turns sustainability into metrics that move credit, investment and M&A decisions.

ai.title: AI-Powered Extraction
ai.desc: Automatically extract and classify ESG data points from corporate documents using advanced natural language processing models.

frameworks.title: Multi-Framework Support
frameworks.desc: Seamlessly report across GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, CSRD, and other major ESG frameworks from a single platform.

scoring.title: Financial Score & Credit Spread
scoring.desc: Composite 0–100 score with basis-point spread, shadow rating, sector percentile and explainable drivers. Every score point moves a real number in the cost of capital.

reports.desc: Generate professional, regulation-compliant reports ready for external auditors, investors, and regulatory bodies.

dashboard.desc: Sector-aware FCFE/DCF with Damodaran betas, live FRED risk-free rate, Monte Carlo (2,000 simulations) and comparable company multiples — all adjusted by the company's ESG score.

welcome.title: Welcome to ESGenius 👋
welcome.body: Quick 60-second tour of your ESG workspace. You can replay it anytime from the green help button at the bottom-right.

sidebar.title: Your navigation
sidebar.body: Everything you need lives in this sidebar — uploads, reports, your live ESG score, AI insights and more.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: Your home base: KPIs, recent activity and a snapshot of how your ESG performance is trending.

upload.title: Upload documents
upload.body: Drop in PDFs, spreadsheets or sustainability reports. Our AI extracts and classifies every ESG data point automatically.

reports.title: Reports
reports.body: See every ESG report you have generated and download deliverables (Executive, Full Disclosure, Audit Trail, etc.).

score.title: ESG Score
score.body: Your live score broken down across Environmental, Social and Governance, with industry benchmarks and historical trend.

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.body: Risk alerts, recommendations and improvement opportunities — generated from your own data.

simulate.title: What-If Simulation
simulate.body: Model how specific actions (e.g. switch to renewables) would lift your score before you commit.

esgReports.title: Buy ESG Reports
esgReports.body: Order a new ESG report bundle: 8 board-ready, audit-ready, stakeholder-ready deliverables in one purchase.

topbar.title: Search, language & theme
topbar.body: Switch language, toggle dark/light mode, search across your workspace and check notifications from here.

done.title: You're all set 🎉
done.body: Start by uploading your first document. Need a refresher? Click the green help button anytime to replay this tour.

welcome.title: Welcome, admin 🛡️
welcome.body: This is the ESGenius admin console. Quick tour of every panel you control — frameworks, companies, users, AI logs and system settings.

sidebar.title: Admin navigation
sidebar.body: All admin tools are in this sidebar. Each section is scoped to platform-wide management.

overview.title: Admin overview
overview.body: Platform-wide metrics: total companies, users, AI usage and ESG score distribution across the customer base.

frameworks.title: Frameworks
frameworks.body: Manage ESG frameworks (GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, ISSB, CSRD), their categories and indicators. Activate or version them globally.

companies.title: Companies
companies.body: View and manage every customer company on the platform — plan, ESG score and assigned users.

users.title: Users
users.body: Manage user accounts, promote/demote admins and audit access. The default admins are seeded from Railway env vars.

aiLogs.title: AI logs
aiLogs.body: Audit every AI call: model, latency, tokens, cost and the user who triggered it. Useful for cost control and debugging.

settings.title: System settings
settings.body: Global configuration: API endpoints, default AI model, upload limits, rate limits, email and feature flags.

done.title: Admin tour complete 🎉
done.body: You can replay this tour anytime from the green help button at the bottom-right. Click 'Back to Dashboard' to return to the user view.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Text: By accessing or using the ESG360 platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not use the Service. ESG360 reserves the right to modify these terms at any time, and continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms.s2Text: ESG360 is a SaaS platform that provides ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) data management, automated report generation, AI-powered document analysis, and sustainability compliance tools. Access is provided on a subscription basis according to the selected plan.
terms.s3Text: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify ESG360 immediately of any unauthorized use.
terms.s4Text: You retain all rights to the data you upload to ESG360. We do not sell, share, or use your data for purposes other than providing the Service. ESG360 may use anonymized, aggregated data for platform improvement and analytics.
terms.s5Text: You agree not to: (a) use the Service for any unlawful purpose; (b) attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Service; (c) interfere with or disrupt the Service; (d) upload malicious code or harmful content; (e) reverse engineer any part of the platform.
terms.s6Text: ESG360 is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, ESG360 shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service.
terms.s7Text: Either party may terminate the Service at any time. Upon termination, you may request an export of your data within 30 days. After this period, your data may be permanently deleted from our systems.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at contact@esg360.digital.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, company information, and ESG-related data you upload. We also automatically collect usage data such as IP address, browser type, pages visited, and interaction patterns to improve our Service.
privacy.s2Text: We use your information to: (a) provide and maintain the Service; (b) process documents and generate ESG reports; (c) send important notifications about your account; (d) improve and personalize your experience; (e) ensure security and prevent fraud.
privacy.s3Text: Your data is stored on secure servers with encryption at rest and in transit. We implement industry-standard security measures including access controls, regular audits, and incident response procedures. We retain your data for as long as your account is active.
privacy.s4Text: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with: (a) service providers who assist in operating the platform (hosting, analytics); (b) legal authorities when required by law; (c) business partners only with your explicit consent.
privacy.s5Text: You have the right to: access your personal data; request correction of inaccurate data; request deletion of your data; export your data in a standard format; withdraw consent for data processing; file a complaint with a data protection authority.
privacy.s6Text: We use essential cookies to operate the platform and analytics cookies to understand usage patterns. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect Service functionality.
privacy.s7Text: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including standard contractual clauses, to protect your data during international transfers.
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us at privacy@esg360.digital.

manifesto.title: ESG is the financial language of sustainability.
manifesto.intro: For too long, sustainability has been a separate language — spoken in glossy reports, debated in side rooms, and bolted onto the financial statements as an afterthought. We reject that.
manifesto.s1Body: Climate risk is credit risk. Carbon is a liability. A water-stressed asset is an impaired asset. Governance failures are P&L events. The discipline of sustainability is the discipline of long-horizon valuation. Anything else is marketing.
manifesto.s2Body: A score is meaningless until it moves a basis point of spread, a euro of provision, or a multiple of EBITDA. Our default unit is the bps. If we cannot translate a metric into capital, we will not ship it.
manifesto.s3Body: Black boxes lose audits and lose trust. Every score we produce ships with its formula, its inputs, its sources, and its uncertainty. No model is too clever to be opened.
manifesto.s4Title: 4. Multi-framework or it did not happen.
manifesto.s4Body: Brazilian CVM Resolution 193, EU CSRD & ESRS, IFRS S1/S2, TCFD, SBTi, GRI, SASB — the frameworks are not in conflict; they are different views of the same reality. Our knowledge graph keeps them in sync so you don't have to.
manifesto.s5Body: Generative models are powerful and fallible. We use them where they help — extraction, drafting, translation — and we log every call, redact PII by default, and let you choose your provider and your jurisdiction.
manifesto.s6Title: 6. Built for both sides of the table.
manifesto.s6Body: Companies need to disclose. Banks and investors need to decide. Both deserve the same primitives. ESG360 is one platform with two front doors and one source of truth.
manifesto.s7Body: We do not optimize for the next quarter. We build for the institutions and regulators that will still be here in 2050. That is a different software discipline — and it's the only one worth practicing.

solutionsFinance.sub: Decision-grade ESG analytics for credit teams, portfolio managers and capital markets desks. From sentiment to spread, with the audit trail you need.
solutionsFinance.pillar1Desc: Weighted ESG score, climate VaR, sector breakdown, top & bottom contributors.
solutionsFinance.pillar2Desc: ESG-adjusted PD & LGD per counterparty. Book impact on expected loss.
solutionsFinance.pillar3Desc: ESG-adjusted WACC, Damodaran sector beta, live FRED rate and enterprise value via two-stage DCF + Monte Carlo.
solutionsFinance.pillar4Desc: NGFS & IEA scenarios with physical and transition VaR, full methodology and auditable explainability.
solutionsFinance.step1Desc: Every score, every AI call, every override — signed, versioned and queryable via API.
solutionsFinance.step2Desc: Open formulas. No black boxes. Defendable in front of regulators and boards.
solutionsFinance.step3Desc: REST endpoints with bearer auth. Embed scores in your CRM, credit system or research notes.
solutionsFinance.crossSub: Same platform, different door — disclosure, funding readiness, materiality.

solutionsCompanies.sub: Comply with CVM 193, CSRD, IFRS S1/S2 and TCFD on one platform — and translate every disclosure into a measurable funding advantage.
solutionsCompanies.pillar1Desc: 0–100 score with bps credit spread translation, shadow rating and sector percentile.
solutionsCompanies.pillar2Desc: Per-instrument self-assessment (SLL, green bond, IPO, M&A, PE) with prioritized remediation plan.
solutionsCompanies.pillar3Desc: NGFS & IEA scenarios — physical and transition VaR with carbon price paths.
solutionsCompanies.pillar4Desc: One disclosure → CSRD/ESRS, IFRS S1/S2, TCFD, CVM 193, SBTi, EU Taxonomy.
solutionsCompanies.step1Desc: PDFs, spreadsheets, ERP exports. AI extracts data points and maps to the correct frameworks.
solutionsCompanies.step2Desc: Composite ESG score, credit spread translation (bps), peer percentile and top drivers.
solutionsCompanies.step3Desc: Export bank-ready decks, embed your score on your IR site and track the impact on your cost of capital.
solutionsCompanies.crossSub: Same platform, different door — portfolio analytics, credit intelligence, valuation impact.
